---
title: "Meet the Agents"
subtitle: "Who Does the Work"
---

# Agent Map

The Clo-Author uses specialized agents. Creators make artifacts. Critics review them. Infrastructure agents coordinate or verify.

## Discovery

### Librarian
Searches PubMed / MEDLINE, Cochrane, registries, and specialty journals. Produces evidence maps, annotated bibliography, and positioning notes.

### librarian-critic
Checks whether the evidence review is complete, recent, and appropriately weighted toward high-certainty sources.

### Explorer
Assesses datasets, registries, and clinical data sources for feasibility and fit.

### explorer-critic
Reviews measurement validity, selection, and external validity risks.

## Design

### Strategist
Proposes the study design, analysis plan, and registry / protocol path.

### strategist-critic
Challenges the design on bias, inference, reporting, and ethics.

## Execution

### Data-engineer
Cleans data, constructs cohorts, and prepares reproducible inputs.

### Coder
Implements the analysis and produces tables / figures.

### coder-critic
Reviews whether the scripts match the design and whether the implementation is reproducible.

## Manuscript and Review

### Writer
Drafts IMRAD sections, structured abstracts, and clinically interpretable prose.

### writer-critic
Checks structure, claims, reporting completeness, and LaTeX quality.

### Editor
Simulates the handling editor for desk review and final decisions.

### domain-referee
Reviews clinical importance, evidence positioning, and external validity.

### methods-referee
Reviews design validity, bias control, and biostatistics.

## Presentation and Infrastructure

### Storyteller
Builds slides from the paper for full-length, seminar, short, or lightning talks.

### storyteller-critic
Reviews narrative flow, readability, and fidelity to the paper.

### Orchestrator
Routes the workflow and enforces dependencies.

### Verifier
Checks compilation, file integrity, execution, and submission-package readiness.
